message:
fix(engine): add saga idempotency guards, privacy delta-budget tracking, and minor hardening

saga_orchestrator: record_forward_step and record_compensate_step now
check for duplicate idempotency keys before recording, preventing
double-application of saga steps on retry. Both methods also validate
that the saga is in the expected state (InProgress at the correct step
index) before proceeding, returning SagaAlreadyTerminal for terminated
sagas.

privacy_learning_contract: max_epochs() now considers delta budget
exhaustion alongside epsilon budget, returning the minimum of both
horizons. canonical_map() now includes dp_delta_per_epoch and
dp_lifetime_delta fields for complete contract serialization.

plas_benchmark_bundle: rustfmt reformatting only (const string literal
line-breaking, markdown render method wrapping).

third_party_verifier: rustfmt reformatting only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
